description: You are an AV/IT Systems Designer retrofitting the FZK-Haus residential project into a 'Smart Home' demonstration centre. Populate the pre-loaded architectural IFC model in Bonsai (BlenderBIM) with AV and IT infrastructure by creating at least two flat-screen TVs and two Wi-Fi routers. The TVs must be assigned the IFC class 'IfcAudioVisualAppliance' with PredefinedType 'DISPLAY' and a Name containing 'Display' or 'TV'. The routers must be assigned the IFC class 'IfcCommunicationsAppliance' with PredefinedType 'ROUTER' or 'NETWORKAPPLIANCE' and a Name containing 'Router' or 'AP'. All four appliances require 3D geometry, valid locations in the 3D viewport, and assignment to an existing spatial container (such as 'Erdgeschoss' or 'Obergeschoss') to ensure they are registered in the spatial tree. Save the updated project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_smart_home.ifc.
